name: Elite Limousine
recent_news: No M&A, ownership, or school-district contract news located as of 2026; name is generic and overlaps with many unrelated 'Elite Limousine' operators in CA/CT/NY/TX.
fit_notes: Tiny ~8-employee limousine operator in Lynwood CA with no confirmed school-bus or SPED-contract footprint; flagged 'special_needs' likely reflects ADA/paratransit livery work rather than yellow school-bus routes. Not an attractive Summit tuck-in unless it holds a confirmed LAUSD-area SPED contract; would need direct outreach to verify.

name: Esquire Limousine Svc
recent_news: No M&A, growth, or CPS/IL school-district contract news located as of 2026; not present in obvious aggregator school-bus contractor lists.
fit_notes: Owner-operated ~6-employee Chicago livery business owned by Zlatan Sucic; lacks school-bus fleet signature and appears to overlap with Chicago's public-passenger-vehicle (livery) regime rather than yellow-bus contracting. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target absent confirmed Type I/II school-bus operations.

name: JC Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or sale news located as of 2026; not visible on the NJ DOE Type S school-bus vendor list under this exact name.
fit_notes: Very small owner-operated Bergen County NJ livery (John Cirizola, ~6 staff) at a residential-style address; while NJ has a vibrant Type S small-vehicle SPED ecosystem, this name does not appear on the state DOE vendor list and there is no fleet/contract evidence. Low-priority tuck-in unless verified as a registered Type S contractor.

name: Khemit Medicar Corp
districts_or_customers: Illinois Medicaid / HFS NEMT program (Transdev/First Transit-adjudicated)
recent_news: Registered Illinois NEMT 'medicar' provider (NPI 1356592208) serving Medicaid recipients; no school-district contracts, M&A, or sale news located.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator. Khemit Medicar is an Illinois Medicaid NEMT 'medicar' (wheelchair-van) provider; the 'special_needs' flag reflects ADA medicar service for Medicaid clients, not student/SPED transportation. Not a Summit tuck-in target — exclude.

name: Triple E Transportation
recent_news: No M&A, school-district contract, or sale news located; the 9982 Anderson Ave / Chicago Ridge address is a multi-tenant transportation hub also housing Ideal Charter Bus, McNamara Cab, and Executive Coach of Chicago, which complicates identification.
fit_notes: Tiny ~6-employee livery/transport operator co-located with multiple unrelated transportation tenants at a Chicago Ridge multi-tenant address; no evidence of yellow-bus or contracted Type I SPED service. Low-priority Summit tuck-in candidate; would need direct call to Ed Monreal to confirm any school-district or SPED revenue.
